author: lOrm
content: Wired the orphan src/tools/args.rs trait into src/tools/mod.rs in d4168fab and ported 7 worst-offender sites (cron create+delete, task_create, web_fetch+search+browser+domain_list, list_files, edit_file path/old/new/replace_all, chainlink). 1797 tests pass (baseline 1770 + 27 new), clippy clean, no #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. Removed unused arg_i64_or to keep dead_code clean. Remaining sites (write.rs, notebook.rs, worktree.rs, lsp.rs, todo.rs, bash/*) deferred to follow-up; helpers are now available.
